title: stelis gloriae
intro: Stelis gloriae, also known as the "Golden Orchid", is a species of orchid found in the tropical forests of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Stelis gloriae include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. Stelis gloriae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
